thesis: AMTECH generates bespoke-feeling operating software for non-technical businesses: governed AI employees and swarms do every computer-based job while the owner never handles API keys, infrastructure, schemas, or provider mechanics.
evidence_boundary: P0/P2 strategy and repository-correspondence artifact. Generated drafts do not imply implementation, live provider acceptance, deployment, or production readiness.

capability_families.name: Identity and assignment
capability_families.description: who the employee works for and what scope it can act inside

capability_families.name: Employee/swarm role generation
capability_families.description: which employees or specialist agents are generated for the business

capability_families.name: Work-object lifecycle
capability_families.description: how work moves from signal to prepared output

capability_families.name: Connectors and external systems
capability_families.description: which business systems are connected without owner API knowledge

capability_families.name: Authority and approval
capability_families.description: what needs owner, manager, or policy approval

capability_families.name: Effects and receipts
capability_families.description: what changes outside AMTECH and how receipts bind proof

capability_families.name: Recovery and repair
capability_families.description: how failures, ambiguity, and stale evidence recover

capability_families.name: Commercial and accounting proof
capability_families.description: how value, cost, payer, and margin are shown

business_axes.name: Lead capture and intake
business_axes.description: turn inbound demand into structured work

business_axes.name: Estimation and quoting
business_axes.description: prepare prices, scope, assumptions, and send-ready quotes

business_axes.name: Scheduling and dispatch
business_axes.description: coordinate time, people, route, and commitments

business_axes.name: Customer communication
business_axes.description: draft, hold, send, and reconcile customer messages

business_axes.name: Back office and bookkeeping
business_axes.description: categorize, invoice, reconcile, and close admin loops

business_axes.name: Procurement and inventory
business_axes.description: manage materials, vendors, stock, and reorder choices

business_axes.name: Delivery, proof, and quality
business_axes.description: turn completed work into proof, artifacts, and follow-up

business_axes.name: Owner intelligence and strategy
business_axes.description: show what changed, what matters, and what to do next

dimensions.feature_combination: Identity and assignment x Lead capture and intake
dimensions.nontechnical_business_use: Generated bespoke software should who the employee works for and what scope it can act inside while it turn inbound demand into structured work, in the owner's business language.

generated_full_stack_implication.ui: A custom-feeling surface for lead capture and intake that hides technical setup and exposes only owner-safe work state.
generated_full_stack_implication.workflow: A generated workflow template binds identity_assignment to lead_intake with explicit states, blockers, and next safe action.
generated_full_stack_implication.connector_config: No new connector authority implied by the draft.
generated_full_stack_implication.proof: Draft proof obligations remain P0/P2 until exact executable or external evidence exists.

dimensions.current_repo_support: source/local contracts for identity, assignment, authority version, owner session
dimensions.missing_gap: generated business ontology and role graph must not invent authority
dimensions.ui_implication: Do not render this as a generic approval card; render it as a bespoke lead capture and intake work app backed by governed employee state.
dimensions.proof_class_available: P0-P3 source/local where present
